properties.description: Study materials panel (المواد الدراسية tab). Tracks 5 enrolled law courses and hosts lecture notes with draft/reviewed status workflow. Recent lectures visible on overview: انعدام الأهلية (draft), القصد الجنائي (draft), عيوب الرضا (reviewed).
